# Wedding Website Project - Setup Instructions

## Project Overview
Static wedding website for an Italian summer party themed wedding at Dworek Przy Lesie.
- Wedding Date: April 10-12, 2026
- Theme: Italian summer party with lemons, light and happy aesthetics
- Venue: Orangerie in forest (Dworek Przy Lesie)
- Three language pages with different information

## Setup Checklist

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements - Static HTML/CSS/JS wedding website
- [ ] Scaffold the Project - Create HTML, CSS, JS files and folder structure
- [ ] Customize the Project - Add wedding content, maps, timetable, theme styling
- [ ] Install Required Extensions - None needed for static HTML
- [ ] Compile the Project - No compilation needed for static site
- [ ] Create and Run Task - Optional: Live server for preview
- [ ] Launch the Project - Open in browser
- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete - Create README with instructions

## Project Structure Plan
```
WeddingStatic/
├── index.html (Main/English page)
├── pl.html (Polish page)
├── de.html (German/Italian page option 3)
├── css/
│   └── style.css (Lemon theme styling)
├── js/
│   └── main.js (Interactions)
├── images/ (Placeholder for photos)
└── README.md
```

## Theme Guidelines
- Colors: Light yellow, white, soft green accents
- Lemon/citrus motifs throughout
- Light, happy, romantic atmosphere
- Responsive design for mobile guests
